docket_entries.description: PAYMENT OF WAIVED FEES (SEP-13-2022 CIVIL COMPLAINT/PETITION/OTHER FIRST PAPER) (CONFIDENTIAL) PAID BY PETITIONER SAYAD, MANDANA
